# colorir — Brownfield Architecture Document

## Introduction

This document captures the CURRENT STATE of the colorir codebase, including technical debt, workarounds, and real-world patterns. It serves as a reference for AI agents working on enhancements.

**Generated:** 2026-06-17
**Generated By:** @architect (Aria)

### Change Log

| Date | Version | Description | Author |
|------|---------|-------------|--------|
| 2026-06-17 | 1.0 | Initial brownfield analysis | Aria (architect) |

## Quick Reference — Key Files and Entry Points

### Critical Files for Understanding the System

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `apps/web/src/main.tsx` | React entry point — creates TanStack Router, renders app |
| `apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx` | Root layout with ThemeProvider, Toaster, DevTools |
| `apps/web/src/routes/routeTree.gen.ts` | Auto-generated router tree |
| `apps/server/src/index.ts` | Hono server entry — all routes inline (44 lines) |
| `packages/db/src/schema/auth.ts` | Database schema (Better-Auth tables) |
| `packages/auth/src/index.ts` | Better-Auth factory + singleton |
| `packages/env/src/server.ts` | Server env var validation (Zod) |
| `packages/env/src/web.ts` | Client env var validation (Zod) |
| `packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css` | Tailwind v4 + CSS variables + themes |
| `biome.json` | Linter and formatter config |
| `docker-compose.yml` | 3-service Docker Compose (web + server + postgres) |

### Enhancement Impact Areas

N/A — this is a comprehensive documentation of the entire codebase, not scoped to a specific enhancement.

## High Level Architecture

### Technical Summary

```
Browser ──> apps/web (React SPA) ──HTTP──> apps/server (Hono API) ──> PostgreSQL
                          ^                        |
                          |                        v
                    TanStack Router          Better-Auth / Drizzle ORM
                    Vite dev server           Google Gemini (AI SDK)
```

- **Frontend:** Single-page application with file-based routing (TanStack Router)
- **Backend:** Lightweight Hono HTTP server with inline route handlers
- **Database:** PostgreSQL accessed via Drizzle ORM (auth tables only, no app tables)
- **Auth:** Better-Auth with email/password, JWT sessions
- **AI:** Google Gemini 2.5 Flash via Vercel AI SDK with streaming responses
- **Monorepo:** Bun workspaces with isolated linker

### Actual Tech Stack

| Category | Technology | Version | Notes |
|----------|-----------|---------|-------|
| Runtime | Bun | 1.3.14 | Also package manager |
| Language | TypeScript | ^6.0.0 | Pre-release, strict mode |
| Frontend | React | 19.2.6 | No StrictMode |
| Router | TanStack Router | 1.168.22 | File-based, auto-generated |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | 4.2.2 | CSS variables in OKLCH |
| UI Components | Base UI (shadcn) | 1.0.0 | Headless, variant "base-lyra" |
| Backend | Hono | 4.8.2 | All routes inline |
| AI SDK | Vercel AI SDK | 6.0.3 | Google Gemini provider |
| AI Model | Gemini 2.5 Flash | — | Via @ai-sdk/google |
| ORM | Drizzle ORM | 0.45.1 | PostgreSQL dialect |
| Database | PostgreSQL | latest | — |
| Auth | Better-Auth | 1.6.11 | Email/password, Drizzle adapter |
| Validation | Zod | 4.1.13 | Via @t3-oss/env-core |
| Linter | Biome | 2.4.16 | Formatter + linter |
| Build (web) | Vite | 8.0.8 | SWC plugin, PWA plugin |
| Build (server) | tsdown | 0.21.9 | ESM output |
| PWA | vite-plugin-pwa | 1.3.0 | Auto-update registration |
| Icons | lucide-react | 1.8.0 / 0.546.0 | **Different versions in web vs ui** |
| Forms | @tanstack/react-form | 1.28.0 | — |
| Toast | sonner | 2.0.7 | With next-themes integration |

### Repository Structure Reality

- **Type:** Monorepo (Bun workspaces)
- **Package Manager:** Bun 1.3.14 (isolated linker via `bunfig.toml`)
- **Scaffold Origin:** Better-T-Stack v3.33.1
- **Notable:** No Turborepo, Nx, or Lerna — uses raw Bun workspaces

## Source Tree and Module Organization

### Project Structure (Actual)

```
colorir/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/                      # React SPA
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── main.tsx          # Entry point
│   │   │   ├── index.css         # Global CSS (imports globals.css + streamdown)
│   │   │   ├── routeTree.gen.ts  # Auto-generated router tree
│   │   │   ├── routes/           # File-based routing (5 route files)
│   │   │   │   ├── __root.tsx    # Root layout
│   │   │   │   ├── index.tsx     # Home page "/"
│   │   │   │   ├── login.tsx     # Login page "/login"
│   │   │   │   ├── ai.tsx        # AI chat page "/ai"
│   │   │   │   └── _auth/        # Auth-guarded group
│   │   │   │       ├── route.tsx  # Auth guard
│   │   │   │       └── dashboard.tsx  # Dashboard "/dashboard"
│   │   │   ├── components/       # App-specific components (7 files)
│   │   │   │   ├── header.tsx
│   │   │   │   ├── loader.tsx
│   │   │   │   ├── mode-toggle.tsx
│   │   │   │   ├── sign-in-form.tsx
│   │   │   │   ├── sign-up-form.tsx
│   │   │   │   ├── theme-provider.tsx
│   │   │   │   └── user-menu.tsx
│   │   │   └── lib/
│   │   │       └── auth-client.ts  # Better-Auth client
│   │   ├── vite.config.ts
│   │   ├── Dockerfile
│   │   └── nginx.conf
│   └── server/                    # Hono API server
│       └── src/
│           └── index.ts           # ALL server logic (44 lines)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                        # Shared UI components
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── components/        # 8 components
│   │       ├── hooks/             # Empty (only .gitkeep)
│   │       ├── lib/utils.ts       # cn() utility
│   │       └── styles/globals.css # Tailwind v4 themes
│   ├── auth/                      # Better-Auth singleton
│   │   └── src/index.ts
│   ├── db/                        # Drizzle ORM schema + client
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── schema/
│   │       │   ├── index.ts
│   │       │   └── auth.ts       # 4 auth tables
│   │       └── index.ts          # DB client singleton
│   ├── env/                       # Zod env validation
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── server.ts
│   │       └── web.ts
│   └── config/                    # Shared tsconfig
│       └── tsconfig.base.json
├── docker-compose.yml             # 3 services
├── biome.json                     # Linter + formatter
├── bunfig.toml                    # isolated linker
└── bts.jsonc                      # Scaffold metadata
```

### Key Modules and Their Purpose

- **Auth System**: `packages/auth/src/index.ts` — Better-Auth factory, module-level singleton
- **Database Layer**: `packages/db/src/` — Drizzle ORM client + 4 auth tables
- **Environment Config**: `packages/env/src/` — Zod-validated env vars (server + client)
- **Shared UI**: `packages/ui/src/components/` — 8 shadcn/ui components (Button, Card, Checkbox, DropdownMenu, Input, Label, Skeleton, Sonner)
- **App Components**: `apps/web/src/components/` — Header, auth forms (135-160 lines each), theme toggle, user menu
- **AI Chat**: `apps/web/src/routes/ai.tsx` — Full streaming chat with `streamdown` renderer
- **Auth Forms**: `apps/web/src/components/sign-in-form.tsx` (135 lines) and `sign-up-form.tsx` (160 lines) using `@tanstack/react-form`

## Data Models and APIs

### Data Models

All database models are defined in `packages/db/src/schema/auth.ts`:

- **User** — `id`, `name`, `email` (unique), `emailVerified`, `image`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
- **Session** — `id`, `expiresAt`, `token` (unique), `ipAddress`, `userAgent`, `userId` (FK -> user, cascade)
- **Account** — `id`, `accountId`, `providerId`, `userId` (FK -> user, cascade), `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `idToken`, `accessTokenExpiresAt`, `refreshTokenExpiresAt`, `scope`, `password`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
- **Verification** — `id`, `identifier`, `value`, `expiresAt`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`

**No application-specific tables exist.** The database only contains Better-Auth tables.

### API Specifications

| Method(s) | Path | Handler | Input Validation | Auth |
|-----------|------|---------|-----------------|------|
| POST, GET | `/api/auth/*` | Better-Auth handler | None (Better-Auth internal) | — |
| POST | `/ai` | Inline streamText to Gemini | **None** | **None** |
| GET | `/` | Returns `"OK"` | — | — |

**All server logic is in a single file** (`apps/server/src/index.ts`, 44 lines).

### Client-Side Auth

`apps/web/src/lib/auth-client.ts` (6 lines):
```ts
import { createAuthClient } from "better-auth/react";
export const authClient = createAuthClient({ baseURL: env.VITE_SERVER_URL });
```

## Technical Debt and Known Issues

### Critical Technical Debt

1. **No input validation for AI endpoint** — `POST /ai` accepts raw JSON without Zod validation. Malformed requests could cause errors.
2. **No error handling middleware** — No global catch in Hono, no error boundary in React root.
3. **Module-level singletons** — `@colorir/db` and `@colorir/auth` create instances at import time (side effects). Importing these modules immediately connects to the database.
4. **No database migrations** — Drizzle configured but no migrations generated yet.
5. **No tests** — Zero test files, no testing framework configured.

### Medium Technical Debt

6. **TypeScript ^6 (pre-release)** — May have breaking changes or instability.
7. **Lucide React version mismatch** — `lucide-react@^0.546.0` in `packages/ui` vs `lucide-react@^1.8.0` in `apps/web`. Different major versions with different APIs.
8. **No .env.example for app** — Root `.env.example` is for AIOX tooling, not application config.
9. **Empty RouterAppContext** — Root route context interface is empty; no auth session or shared data injected at root level.
10. **No StrictMode** — React StrictMode not enabled in development.
11. **Relative .env path in drizzle.config** — Hardcoded `../../apps/server/.env` is fragile.
12. **SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION workaround** — Toggled on/off across Docker build stages.
13. **shadcn in runtime deps** — `shadcn@^3.6.2` is in `dependencies` instead of `devDependencies` in `packages/ui`.

### Workarounds and Gotchas

- **Docker builds use `SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=1`** during build, then clear it for runtime. This is necessary because env vars aren't available at build time.
- **`(import.meta as any).env`** cast in `packages/env/src/web.ts` — a type safety workaround for Vite's import.meta.env.
- **`/* @__PURE__ */`** comment in `$onUpdate` callbacks — an ESLint tree-shaking workaround in Drizzle schema timestamps.
- **CORS configured for production** — `sameSite: "none"`, `secure: true` in auth config. May cause issues in local development without HTTPS.
- **All routes inline in server** — No route splitting, controllers, or service layer. Adding routes means modifying the single `index.ts` file.

## Integration Points and External Dependencies

### External Services

| Service | Purpose | Integration Type | Key Files |
|---------|---------|------------------|-----------|
| Google Gemini 2.5 Flash | AI Chat | Vercel AI SDK (`@ai-sdk/google`) | `apps/server/src/index.ts` |
| PostgreSQL | Database | Drizzle ORM + `pg` driver | `packages/db/src/index.ts`, `packages/db/src/schema/auth.ts` |

### Internal Integration Points

- **Frontend-Backend Communication**: REST API at `VITE_SERVER_URL` (default `http://localhost:3000`)
- **Auth Flow**: Client -> `POST /api/auth/*` -> Better-Auth handler -> Drizzle ORM -> PostgreSQL
- **AI Flow**: Client -> `POST /ai` -> `streamText` with Google Gemini -> Streaming response
- **Workspace Packages**: All `@colorir/*` packages are inter-linked via Bun workspaces; server bundles them via `noExternal: [/@colorir\/.*/]`

## Development and Deployment

### Local Development Setup

1. Install dependencies: `bun install`
2. Start PostgreSQL (Docker): `docker compose up -d postgres` or local instance
3. Push schema to database: `bun run db:push` (creates tables without migrations)
4. Set environment variables in `apps/server/.env` (see example below)
5. Start dev servers: `bun run dev` (runs web + server concurrently)

**Required environment variables** (`apps/server/.env`):
```
DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:password@localhost:5432/colorir
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=<your-secret-min-32-chars>
BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000
CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3001
GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY=<your-gemini-key>
```

**Required environment variables** (`apps/web/.env`):
```
VITE_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000
```

**Known issues:**
- Drizzle Kit config expects server `.env` at relative path `../../apps/server/.env`
- No seed data scripts exist
- No migration history — schema is applied fresh via `db:push`

### Build and Deployment Process

- **Development**: `bun run dev` — Vite dev server (port 3001) + Bun hot-reload server (port 3000)
- **Build web**: `bun run build --filter web` — Vite build to `apps/web/dist/`
- **Build server**: `bun run build --filter server` — tsdown bundles to `apps/server/dist/index.mjs`
- **Docker**: `docker compose up --build` — Builds web (nginx), server (node:24-slim + bun), postgres
- **Type checking**: `bun run check-types` — Runs across all packages (web builds before typechecking)
- **Binary compilation**: `bun run --filter server compile` — Compiles server to standalone binary

### Docker Configuration

- **web** (port 3001:80): Nginx serving static SPA with cache headers and gzip
- **server** (port 3000:3000): node:24-slim running bun-built ESM output
- **postgres** (port 5432:5432): Official PostgreSQL image with persistent volume

Health checks: server `GET /`, postgres `pg_isready`

## Testing Reality

### Current Test Coverage

- **Unit Tests:** None — no testing framework is installed
- **Integration Tests:** None
- **E2E Tests:** None
- **Manual Testing:** Only development method

### Running Tests

No test command exists. No test files exist anywhere in the application code (excluding `.aiox-core/` framework internals).

## Appendix — Useful Commands and Scripts

### Frequently Used Commands

```bash
bun install            # Install all workspace dependencies
bun run dev            # Start all dev servers concurrently
bun run build          # Build all packages and apps
bun run check-types    # TypeScript type checking across all packages
bun run db:push        # Push Drizzle schema to database (create tables)
bun run db:generate    # Generate Drizzle migrations
bun run db:migrate     # Run Drizzle migrations
bun run db:studio      # Open Drizzle Studio (GUI database browser)
bun run lint           # Run Biome linter
bun run format         # Run Biome formatter
docker compose up      # Start all services in Docker
```

### Biome Commands

```bash
bun run lint           # Lint check (Biome)
bun run format         # Format check (Biome)
bun run lint:fix       # Lint with auto-fix
bun run format:fix     # Format with auto-fix
```

### Debugging and Troubleshooting

- **Auth issues**: Check `BETTER_AUTH_SECRET` (min 32 chars) and `CORS_ORIGIN` match the web dev server
- **Database connection**: Verify PostgreSQL is running and `DATABASE_URL` is correct
- **AI not working**: Verify `GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY` is set and valid
- **CORS errors**: Ensure `CORS_ORIGIN` matches the frontend URL (http://localhost:3001 for dev)
- **Build failures**: Check TypeScript strict mode errors — `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` and `verbatimModuleSyntax` are common sources
